title: Superpower
Description
table-750-750.caption: Provide the superpowers of the superhero called Deathlok.
data: Deathlok possesses strength far beyond human limits.
Deathlok can move at speeds exceeding normal human capabilities.
Deathlok can exert himself for extended periods without tiring.
Deathlok's body is augmented with cybernetics, granting enhanced abilities.
Deathlok can project energy blasts from his cybernetic components.
